Chess Clock — beautiful timer for over-the-board play

12 preset time controls (bullet, blitz, rapid, classical) with
increment support. Tap to switch, pause/resume, move counter,
red time warning under 30s, tenths display under 20s. Top player
rotated 180 degrees for face-to-face play. 202KB bundle, offline PWA.

Add auto-deploy workflow

Fix: vendor SDK into repo so CF Pages builds succeed

SDK was a workspace link to a directory outside the repo — CF Pages
can't resolve it during build. Moved SDK source into web/src/sdk/
with direct relative imports. Two prior deploys were failing for this.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: remove dead Firebase, wire RSVP to API, fix SPA routing

- Remove firebase dependency and lib/firebase.ts (dead code)
- RSVP button now calls platform API (POST/DELETE /meetup/events/:id/rsvp)
- Add _redirects for CF Pages SPA routing (fixes 404 on direct links)
- Fix useAuth to use UserWithRoles type from SDK

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch meetup from Firebase to FreeAppStore platform API

Uses @freeappstore/sdk to talk to api.freeappstore.online (CF Workers + D1).
Firebase completely removed — bundle dropped from 622KB to 428KB.
Events now served from D1 with local seed data as fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
